environment_diagnostics.evidence: Attempts 1-2 were complete return-0 runs with DEGRADED clock residuals of 143421012 and 105761236 ns; attempt 3 had a PX4 stack-smashing abort during TAKEOFF. Post-run audit found load averages 7.40/7.76/8.06 with remote-desktop and GUI CPU load, but no experiment residue, occupied ports, memory exhaustion, or disk pressure.
environment_diagnostics.next_action: Checkpoint attempt 3, allow validation/push cooldown, then retry only the missing Dynamic side with a new attempt ID and unchanged standards.

environment_diagnostics.evidence: Attempts 1-2 both ended in PX4 process aborts and produced no complete flight/trace/clock artifact set: attempt 1 failed during preflight with a pthread mutex assertion, while attempt 2 reached takeoff and landing before stack-smashing detection. Post-attempt audit found load averages 8.60/8.35/8.36 with remote-desktop and GUI CPU load, but no experiment-process residue, occupied campaign ports, memory exhaustion, or workspace disk pressure.
environment_diagnostics.next_action: Checkpoint attempt 2 and retry only the missing Dynamic side as attempt 3 with the matched seed and unchanged frozen identity and acceptance standards.

resume_history.event: Formal v6 created under AUTHORIZED_FOR_V6_CREATION after exact candidate-identity, v5-manifest-hash, focused-test, and full-validator checks passed; no historical or candidate-pilot side is reusable.
